reference_goal: POV sketch humor inspired by public short-form French comedy mechanics, not copied from any creator.

style_mode.name: pousse_mais_safe
style_mode.description: Langage tres oral, frontal, grossier et provocateur, mais la cible comique reste la mauvaise foi, la production, les objets et les situations.

joke_engines: tentation alimentaire traitee comme un crime
reaction trop serieuse a un probleme ridicule
silence puis punchline sale mais non haineuse

subtitle_policy.audio: can include frequent casual profanity when the joke targets the situation, not a protected trait
subtitle_policy.subtitles: prefer softened profanity for monetization on the strongest words, e.g. p*tain, m*rde
